topic: Intermittent fasting 16:8 — what 5 studies actually proved
caption:
Ever wondered what 16:8 intermittent fasting *actually* does to your body? 🤔 Beyond the hype, science confirms powerful benefits. Five key studies reveal how this protocol triggers cellular repair (autophagy), dramatically improves insulin sensitivity, shifts your metabolism to burn stored fat, boosts brain health via BDNF, and even influences markers of longevity. It's not just about weight loss; it's about profound cellular optimization. Ready to recode your health? 🧬🧠🔥

💾 Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who needs to see the science behind IF. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health insights. Don't forget — your future body will thank you!
